closingChain.label: Due Diligence
closingChain.description: Property inspected and insurance coverage verified

closingChain.label: Underwriting
closingChain.description: Lender reviews financial package and underwrites the loan

closingChain.label: Loan Committee
closingChain.description: Loan committee approves based on underwriting and due diligence

closingChain.label: Closing
closingChain.description: Title clears, documents execute, deal funds

closingChain.label: Financing
closingChain.description: Lender approves loan or buyer confirms equity

closingChain.label: Diligence Upload
closingChain.description: Founder uploads term sheet, cap table, and financials

closingChain.label: Investor Review
closingChain.description: Investor and counsel review submitted documents

closingChain.label: Legal & Audit
closingChain.description: Counsel finalizes agreements; auditor reviews financials
